summary: Tested business type settings and table service conditional visibility. Found and fixed a bug where waiter login always redirected to /tables regardless of business type. All features now working correctly.

login_page.keypad_only: PASS - Login page shows only keypad, no register form or link
login_page.no_company_registration: PASS - No company registration text found

settings_company_tab.business_type_selector: PASS - Shows 6 options (Restaurant, Cafe, Bar, Nightclub, Supermarket, Retail)
settings_company_tab.current_selection_highlighted: PASS - Selected type highlighted in blue
settings_company_tab.indicator_text_table_service: PASS - Shows 'Table service & waiter pages enabled' for restaurant/cafe/bar/nightclub
settings_company_tab.indicator_text_quick_service: PASS - Shows 'Quick service only (no waiter/table pages)' for supermarket/retail

admin_dashboard.tables_visible_restaurant: PASS - Tables menu item visible when business_type is restaurant
admin_dashboard.tables_hidden_supermarket: PASS - Tables menu item hidden when business_type is supermarket

cashier_page.tables_button_visible_restaurant: PASS - Tables button visible when business_type is restaurant
cashier_page.tables_button_hidden_supermarket: PASS - Tables button hidden when business_type is supermarket

waiter_login_redirect.redirect_to_tables_restaurant: PASS - Waiter redirects to /tables when business_type is restaurant
waiter_login_redirect.redirect_to_cashier_supermarket: PASS - Waiter redirects to /cashier when business_type is supermarket (FIXED)

backend_api.admin_role_required: PASS - Settings update requires admin role

bugs_fixed.issue: Waiter login always redirected to /tables regardless of business type
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated handleLogin to use user.hasTableService returned from login function
bugs_fixed.root_cause: LoginPage was hardcoded to navigate('/tables') for waiters without checking hasTableService

bugs_fixed.issue: hasTableService value was stale during login navigation
bugs_fixed.fix: Modified login() to await fetchSettings() and return hasTableService with user data
bugs_fixed.root_cause: fetchSettings() was called but not awaited, so state wasn't updated before navigation

updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.js - Fixed waiter redirect to use hasTableService
/app/backend/tests/test_business_type.py - Created new test file for business type settings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Business type settings feature fully tested. TABLE_SERVICE_TYPES = ['restaurant', 'nightclub', 'bar', 'cafe']. When business type is in this list, hasTableService=true and Tables are shown. When business type is 'supermarket' or 'retail', hasTableService=false and Tables are hidden. Waiter login redirect now correctly uses hasTableService to determine destination (/tables vs /cashier).
